---
title: "UDS_Final_Project"
author: "Gaurav Law"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r install packages, warning=FALSE}

install.packages("renv")

# 1. Install all standard CRAN packages
renv::install(c(
  "tidyverse", "xgboost", "randomForest", "broom", "janitor", 
  "pROC", "reshape2", "caret", "purrr", "fuzzyjoin", "gt", 
  "gtExtras", "prismatic", "ggrepel", "scales", "ggimage", 
  "rvest", "stringi", "AdvancedBasketballStats", "hoopR"
))

# 2. Install the GitHub-only packages
renv::install(c(
  "lbenz730/ncaahoopR",
  "andreweatherman/toRvik",
  "andreweatherman/cbbdata"
))

renv::snapshot()
```


```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(xgboost)
library(randomForest)
library(broom)
library(janitor)
library(pROC)
library(reshape2)
library(caret)
library(purrr)
library(fuzzyjoin)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)
library(gtExtras)
library(prismatic)
library(ggrepel)
library(scales)
library(purrr)
library(ggimage)

library(hoopR)
library(ncaahoopR)
library(toRvik)
library(AdvancedBasketballStats)
library(cbbdata)
library(rvest)
library(stringi)
```


```{r load inital MBB data}

# Player box stats 2003-2026
player_03_26_load <- hoopR::load_mbb_player_box(seasons = c(2003:2026))

player_03_26 <- player_03_26_load %>%
  filter(!is.nan(minutes) & !is.na(minutes)) %>%
  group_by(athlete_id, season) %>%
  reframe(team_id, athlete_display_name, athlete_position_name, athlete_headshot_href,
          team_location, team_logo,
          across(
            c(minutes:points),
            ~ round(mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
            ),
          games = n()) %>%
  #filter(minutes >= 15 & games >= 19) %>%
  distinct()

```

```{r draft data 2005-25}

scrape_nba_draft <- function(years) {
  
  scrape_single_year <- function(year) {
    url <- paste0("https://www.basketball-reference.com/draft/NBA_", year, ".html")
    
    tryCatch({
      full_table <- read_html(url)
      
      draft <- full_table %>%
        html_nodes("table") %>%
        .[[1]] %>%
        html_table(fill = TRUE)
      
      # Set first row as column names and remove it
      colnames(draft) <- draft[1, ]
      draft <- draft[-1, ]
      
      # Remove duplicate header rows that appear mid-table
      draft <- draft[draft[[1]] != colnames(draft)[1], ]
      
      # Add year column for reference
      draft$draft_year <- year
      
      message("Successfully scraped ", year, " NBA Draft (", nrow(draft), " rows)")
      return(draft)
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning("Failed to scrape year ", year, ": ", e$message)
      return(NULL)
    })
  }
  
  # Scrape all years and bind into one data frame
  all_drafts <- lapply(years, function(y) {
    Sys.sleep(3)
    scrape_single_year(y)
  })
  
  # Drop any failed years and combine
  all_drafts <- Filter(Negate(is.null), all_drafts)
  combined <- bind_rows(all_drafts)
  
  return(combined)
}

all_years <- c(2005:2025)

# Run the scraper
draft_data <- scrape_nba_draft(all_years)


```


```{r}
# Look at name differences between players in the dataframes
#setdiff(draft_upd$Player, player_03_26$athlete_display_name)
```


```{r Join manipulation}

# Look at case by case data manipulation
draft_upd <- draft_data %>%
  select(Pk, Player, College, draft_year) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~na_if(., "")),
         Season = draft_year,
         Pk = as.integer(Pk),
         Player = stri_trans_general(Player, "Latin-ASCII"),
         Player = case_when(
           Player == "V.J. Edgecombe" ~ "VJ Edgecombe",
           Player == "J.J. Hickson" ~ "JJ Hickson",
           Player == "Patrick Ewing" ~ "Patrick Ewing Jr.",
           Player == "Marcus Morris" ~ "Marcus Morris Sr.",
           Player == "Jeff Taylor" ~ "Jeffery Taylor",
           Player == "Robbie Hummel" ~ "Robbie John Hummel",
           Player == "K.J. McDaniels" ~ "KJ McDaniels",
           Player == "R.J. Hunter" ~ "RJ Hunter",
           Player == "A.J. Hammons" ~ "AJ Hammons",
           Player == "Harry Giles" ~ "Harry Giles III",
           Player == "Wade Baldwin" ~ "Wade Baldwin IV",
           Player == "Kevin Knox" ~ "Kevin Knox II",
           Player == "Vince Edwards" ~ "Vincent Edwards",
           Player == "Tristan Da Silva" ~ "Tristan da Silva",
           Player == "DaRon Holmes" ~ "DaRon Holmes II",
           Player == "Egor Dёmin" ~ "Egor Demin",
           TRUE ~ Player
         )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Player),
         !is.na(Pk),
         !is.na(College),
         Player != "Player")

player_03_26 <- player_03_26 %>%
  mutate(athlete_display_name = case_when(
    athlete_display_name == "Robbie John Hummel" ~ "Robbie Hummel",
    athlete_display_name == "Pierre Deshawn Jackson" ~ "Pierre Jackson",
    athlete_display_name == "Erik Jay Murphy" ~ "Erik Murphy",
    athlete_display_name == "Johnny O'Bryant III" ~ "Johnny O'Bryant",
    athlete_display_name == "O.G. Anunoby" ~ "OG Anunoby",
    athlete_display_name == "Xavier Tillman" ~ "Xavier Tillman Sr.",
    athlete_display_name == "GG Jackson" ~ "GG Jackson II",
    athlete_display_name == "Carlton Carrington" ~ "Bub Carrington",
    TRUE ~ athlete_display_name
  ))

player_03_26 <- player_03_26 %>%
  group_by(athlete_id) %>%
  mutate(num_years_college = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

# Since data only starts in 2005, we manually went through 2004-2008 to get the real number of years a player spent in college
# draft_pre_08 <- read_csv("~/Downloads/draft_pre_08.csv") # change to data/
draft_pre_08 <- read_csv("data/draft_pre_08.csv")


```

```{r Joins}
draft_full <- draft_upd %>%
  left_join(player_03_26, by = c(Player = "athlete_display_name", Season = "season")) %>%
  left_join(draft_pre_08, by = c("Player", "College", "draft_year", "Season", "Pk")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(minutes)) %>%
  mutate(num_years_college = ifelse(Season <= 2008, num_years_college.y, num_years_college.x)) %>%
  select(-c(num_years_college.x, num_years_college.y, Season))

draft_full <- draft_full %>%
  mutate(College = case_when(
    College == "Rutgers University" ~ "Rutgers",
    College == "Rice University" ~ "Rice",
    College == "Marist College" ~ "Marist",
    College == "Rider University" ~ "Rider",
    College == "Central Florida" ~ "UCF",
    College == "University of Tennessee at Martin" ~ "UT-Martin",
    College == "Texas-El Paso" ~ "UTEP",
    College == "Morehead State University" ~ "Morehead State",
    College == "Cleveland State University" ~ "Cleveland State",
    College == "Tennessee Technological University" ~ "Tennessee Tech",
    College == "University of North Texas" ~ "North Texas",
    College == "Georgia State University" ~ "Georgia State",
    College == "Utah State University" ~ "Utah State",
    College == "Ohio University" ~ "Ohio",
    College == "UW-Milwaukee" ~ "Milwaukee",
    College == "Furman University" ~ "Furman",
    College == "University of Akron" ~ "Akron",
    TRUE ~ College
  ))
```

```{r torvik}
# Torvik stats 2010-2025
get_torvik <- function(years) {
  purrr::map_df(years, function(year) {
    cbd_torvik_player_season(year = year) %>%
      mutate(Season = year) %>%
      relocate(Season, .after = pos)
  })
}

# Torvik data 2008-2025
cbb_player <- get_torvik(2008:2026)

cbb_player <- cbb_player %>%
  rename("yr" = "exp",
         "ht" = "hgt") %>%
  select(yr, ht, player, Season, team, conf, g, pos, mpg, porpag, dporpag,
         bpm, obpm, dbpm, ortg, drtg, usg, efg, ts, oreb, dreb,
         ast, to, blk, stl)



#torvik_26 <- read_csv('/Users/gauravlaw/Desktop/Understanding Data Science/SP26_IDS701_UDS_Project/data/Torvik_26.csv') # change to data/Torvik_26.csv
torvik_26 <- read_csv('data/Torvik_26.csv')

torvik_26 <- torvik_26 %>%
  rename_with(tolower) %>%
  mutate(mpg = `min%` * g / 100,
         Season = 2026) %>%
  select(-c(rk, `min%`)) %>%
  rename("pos" = "role",
         "porpag" = "prpg!",
         "dporpag" = "d-prpg",
         "drtg" = "d-rtg",
         "oreb" = "or",
         "dreb" = "dr")

cbb_player <- cbb_player %>%
  bind_rows(torvik_26)
```


```{r impact for college}

# Impact factor: Calculated by Gaurav Law (have used in multiple projects for MCBB + WCBB)
# Used AI to help with function but formula has been used many times
calculate_season_impact <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    group_by(Season) %>% 
    mutate(
      `net rtg` = ortg - drtg
    ) %>%
    drop_na(`net rtg`, usg, mpg) %>%
    mutate(
      # Net Rating Standardization
      mean_rtg = mean(`net rtg`),
      sd_rtg = sd(`net rtg`),
      net_std = round((`net rtg` - mean_rtg) / sd_rtg, 2),
      
      # Minutes Standardization 
      min_sd = sd(mpg),
      min_std = round(mpg / min_sd, 2),
      
      # Combined Net * Min Score
      raw_net_min = net_std * min_std,
      max_raw_net_min = max(raw_net_min, na.rm = TRUE),
      net_min_std = round(raw_net_min / max_raw_net_min, 2),
      
      # PORPAG Standardization
      prpg_mpg = porpag * mpg,
      mean_prpg = mean(prpg_mpg),
      sd_prpg = sd(prpg_mpg),
      prpg_std = round((prpg_mpg - mean_prpg) / sd_prpg, 2)
    ) %>%
    
    # Impact Score Calculation (max = 25 per season)
    mutate(
      term_1 = net_min_std - min(net_min_std, na.rm = TRUE),
      term_2 = prpg_std - min(prpg_std, na.rm = TRUE),
      raw_impact_score = usg * term_1 * term_2,
      max_season_impact = max(raw_impact_score, na.rm = TRUE),
      impact = round(raw_impact_score / (max_season_impact / 25), 3)
    ) %>%
    
    # Filter for eligible players
    filter(mpg >= 15 & g >= 19) %>%
    # mutate(
    #   fgm = round(fgm / g, 1),
    #   ftm = round(ftm / g, 1),
    #   fta = round(fta / g, 1),
    #   three_m = round(three_m / g, 1),
    #   three_a = round(three_a / g, 1)
    # ) %>%
    select(-mean_rtg, -sd_rtg, -min_sd, -mean_prpg, -sd_prpg, 
           -term_1, -term_2, -raw_net_min, -max_raw_net_min, 
           -raw_impact_score, -max_season_impact) %>%
    
    ungroup()
}

cbb_ovr <- calculate_season_impact(cbb_player)


# Fix joins
cbb_ovr <- cbb_ovr %>%
  mutate(team = str_replace_all(team, "St\\.", "State"),
         team = case_when(
           team == "North Carolina" ~ "UNC",
           team == "Connecticut" ~ "UConn",
           team == "North Carolina State" ~ "NC State",
           team == "Pittsburgh" ~ "Pitt",
           team == "Miami FL" ~ "Miami (FL)",
           team == "Massachusetts" ~ "UMass",
           team == "Tennessee Martin" ~ "UT-Martin",
           team == "Mississippi" ~ "Ole Miss",
           team == "State John's" ~ "St. John's",
           team == "State Bonaventure" ~ "St. Bonaventure",
           team == "Long Beach State" ~ "Cal State Long Beach",
           team == "Loyola MD" ~ "Loyola (MD)",
           TRUE ~ team
        ))


```


```{r Final NCAA data formation}

# Join to get players and impact
draft_test <- draft_full %>%
  stringdist_full_join(
    cbb_ovr,
    by = c(Player = "player", College = "team"),
    method = "jw",
    max_dist = 0.1,
    distance_col = "dist"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(impact) & !is.na(Player)) %>%
  arrange(-impact)


# Transpose NCAA data
draft_test <- draft_test %>%
  select(Pk, Player, player, College, draft_year, athlete_id, team_location, Season, impact, num_years_college) %>%
  group_by(Player) %>%
  arrange(Season, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(college_yr = paste0("college_", row_number())) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols    = c(Pk, Player, player, College, draft_year, athlete_id, team_location, num_years_college),
    names_from  = college_yr,
    values_from = impact
  ) %>%
  # Ensure all 4 columns exist even if a player only has 1-2 seasons
  mutate(
    college_1 = if ("college_1" %in% names(.)) college_1 else NA_real_,
    college_2 = if ("college_2" %in% names(.)) college_2 else NA_real_,
    college_3 = if ("college_3" %in% names(.)) college_3 else NA_real_,
    college_4 = if ("college_4" %in% names(.)) college_4 else NA_real_,
    Player = str_remove(Player, "\\s+(Jr\\.|Sr\\.|II|III|IV|V)$")
  ) %>%
  select(Pk, Player, player, College, draft_year, athlete_id, team_location,
         college_1, college_2, college_3, college_4, num_years_college)

# Joins manipulation
draft_test <- draft_test %>%
  mutate(team_location = case_when(
    team_location == "Rutgers University" ~ "Rutgers",
    team_location == "Rice University" ~ "Rice",
    team_location == "Marist College" ~ "Marist",
    team_location == "Rider University" ~ "Rider",
    team_location == "Central Florida" ~ "UCF",
    team_location == "University of Tennessee at Martin" ~ "UT-Martin",
    team_location == "Texas-El Paso" ~ "UTEP",
    team_location == "Morehead State University" ~ "Morehead State",
    team_location == "Cleveland State University" ~ "Cleveland State",
    team_location == "Tennessee Technological University" ~ "Tennessee Tech",
    team_location == "University of North Texas" ~ "North Texas",
    team_location == "Georgia State University" ~ "Georgia State",
    team_location == "Utah State University" ~ "Utah State",
    team_location == "Ohio University" ~ "Ohio",
    team_location == "UW-Milwaukee" ~ "Milwaukee",
    team_location == "Furman University" ~ "Furman",
    team_location == "University of Akron" ~ "Akron",
    team_location == "North Carolina" ~ "UNC",
     team_location == "Connecticut" ~ "UConn",
     team_location == "North Carolina State" ~ "NC State",
     team_location == "Pittsburgh" ~ "Pitt",
     team_location == "Miami" ~ "Miami (FL)",
     team_location == "Massachusetts" ~ "UMass",
     team_location == "Tennessee Martin" ~ "UT-Martin",
     team_location == "Mississippi" ~ "Ole Miss",
     team_location == "State John's" ~ "St. John's",
     team_location == "State Bonaventure" ~ "St. Bonaventure",
     team_location == "Long Beach State" ~ "Cal State Long Beach",
     team_location == "Loyola MD" ~ "Loyola (MD)",
    team_location == "Charleston" ~ "College of Charleston",
    TRUE ~ team_location
  )) %>%
  filter(College == team_location)

# Collapse rows if duplicate players
draft_test <- draft_test %>%
  group_by(Player, College, draft_year) %>%
  summarise(
    across(c(Pk, athlete_id, team_location, num_years_college),
           ~first(na.omit(.))),
    college_1 = first(na.omit(college_1)),
    college_2 = first(na.omit(college_2)),
    college_3 = first(na.omit(college_3)),
    college_4 = first(na.omit(college_4)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


```{r push years}
# If there is a disparity between num_years_college and the number of values a player has:
# 1) Push the first year a player has by x positions
# 2) Impute based on medians for that column

college_cols <- c("college_1", "college_2", "college_3", "college_4")

col_medians <- sapply(college_cols, function(col) median(draft_test[[col]], na.rm = TRUE))

draft_test <- draft_test %>%
  mutate(
    pmap_dfr(
      list(college_1, college_2, college_3, college_4, num_years_college),
      function(c1, c2, c3, c4, nyc) {
        vals      <- c(c1, c2, c3, c4)
        n_present <- sum(!is.na(vals))
        disparity <- as.integer(nyc) - n_present

        if (disparity > 0) {
          non_na  <- vals[!is.na(vals)]
          shifted <- c(rep(NA_real_, disparity), non_na, rep(NA_real_, 4))[1:4]

          for (i in seq_len(min(disparity, 4))) {
            if (is.na(shifted[i])) shifted[i] <- col_medians[i]
          }
          vals <- shifted
        }

        tibble(college_1 = vals[1], college_2 = vals[2],
               college_3 = vals[3], college_4 = vals[4])
      }
    )
  )
```



# NBA data

<!-- ```{r scrape NBA data, calculate NBA impact} -->

<!-- # --- 1. Scraper for a single season --- -->
<!-- scrape_nba_season <- function(year) { -->
<!--   message("Scraping ", year - 1, "-", substr(year, 3, 4), "...") -->
<!--   Sys.sleep(4) -->

<!--   url_1 <- paste0("https://www.basketball-reference.com/leagues/NBA_", year, "_per_poss.html") -->
<!--   url_2 <- paste0("https://www.basketball-reference.com/leagues/NBA_", year, "_advanced.html") -->

<!--   tryCatch({ -->
<!--     table_1 <- read_html(url_1) %>% -->
<!--       html_nodes("table") %>% -->
<!--       .[[1]] %>% -->
<!--       html_table(fill = TRUE) -->

<!--     Sys.sleep(4) -->

<!--     table_2 <- read_html(url_2) %>% -->
<!--       html_nodes("table") %>% -->
<!--       .[[1]] %>% -->
<!--       html_table(fill = TRUE) -->

<!--     full_table <- table_1 %>% -->
<!--       left_join(table_2, by = c("Player", "Team", "Age")) %>% -->
<!--       filter(Rk.x != "Rk") %>% -->
<!--       mutate(season = year) -->

<!--     # Coerce numeric columns -->
<!--     full_table <- full_table %>% -->
<!--       mutate( -->
<!--         across(c(ORtg, DRtg, PER, `USG%`, MP.x, G.x), as.numeric) -->
<!--       ) -->

<!--     return(full_table) -->

<!--   }, error = function(e) { -->
<!--     warning("Failed for year ", year, ": ", e$message) -->
<!--     return(NULL) -->
<!--   }) -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- # --- 2. Calculate impact score relative to each season --- -->
<!-- calculate_impact <- function(df) { -->
<!--   df %>% -->
<!--     mutate( -->
<!--       `NET RTG`  = ORtg - DRtg, -->
<!--       MPG        = MP.x / G.x, -->
<!--       `PER*MPG`  = PER * MPG -->
<!--     ) %>% -->
<!--     drop_na(`NET RTG`) %>% -->
<!--     mutate( -->
<!--       # All standardizations relative to THIS season -->
<!--       net_std     = round((`NET RTG` - mean(`NET RTG`, na.rm = TRUE)) / -->
<!--                             sd(`NET RTG`,   na.rm = TRUE), 2), -->
<!--       min_std     = round(MPG / sd(MPG, na.rm = TRUE), 2), -->
<!--       net_min_std = round( -->
<!--         (net_std * min_std) / max(net_std * min_std, na.rm = TRUE), 2 -->
<!--       ), -->
<!--       per_std     = round( -->
<!--         (`PER*MPG` - mean(`PER*MPG`, na.rm = TRUE)) / -->
<!--           sd(`PER*MPG`, na.rm = TRUE), 2 -->
<!--       ), -->
<!--       # Impact score on 25-point scale relative to this season -->
<!--       impact = round( -->
<!--         `USG%` * (net_min_std - min(net_min_std)) * (per_std - min(per_std)) / -->
<!--           (max(`USG%` * (net_min_std - min(net_min_std)) * -->
<!--                  (per_std - min(per_std))) / 25), -->
<!--         3 -->
<!--       ) -->
<!--     ) -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- # --- 3. Run across all seasons --- -->
<!-- years <- 2008:2026  # 2007-08 through 2025-26 -->

<!-- all_seasons_raw <- map(years, scrape_nba_season) %>% -->
<!--   compact()  # drops any NULLs from failed years -->

<!-- # Apply impact calculation within each season, then stack -->
<!-- all_seasons <- all_seasons_raw %>% -->
<!--   map(calculate_impact) %>% -->
<!--   bind_rows() -->

<!-- # --- 4. Final clean outputs --- -->

<!-- # All players, all seasons -->
<!-- player_fct_full <- all_seasons %>% -->
<!--   select(Player, Team, Pos.x, season, impact) %>% -->
<!--   rename(Pos = Pos.x) %>% -->
<!--   arrange(season, -impact) -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- # Transpose NBA data -->
<!-- player_fct_full <- player_fct_full %>% -->
<!--   select(Player, season, impact) %>% -->
<!--   group_by(Player) %>% -->
<!--   arrange(season, .by_group = TRUE) %>% -->
<!--   mutate(nba_yr = paste0("nba_season_", row_number())) %>% -->
<!--   ungroup() %>% -->
<!--   pivot_wider( -->
<!--     id_cols     = Player, -->
<!--     names_from  = nba_yr, -->
<!--     values_from = impact -->
<!--   ) %>% -->
<!--   mutate( -->
<!--     nba_season_1 = if ("nba_season_1" %in% names(.)) nba_season_1 else NA_real_, -->
<!--     nba_season_2 = if ("nba_season_2" %in% names(.)) nba_season_2 else NA_real_, -->
<!--     nba_season_3 = if ("nba_season_3" %in% names(.)) nba_season_3 else NA_real_, -->
<!--     nba_season_4 = if ("nba_season_4" %in% names(.)) nba_season_4 else NA_real_, -->
<!--     nba_season_5 = if ("nba_season_5" %in% names(.)) nba_season_5 else NA_real_, -->
<!--     Player = str_remove(Player, "\\s+(Jr\\.|Sr\\.|II|III|IV|V)$") -->
<!--   ) %>% -->
<!--   select(Player, nba_season_1, nba_season_2, nba_season_3, nba_season_4, nba_season_5) -->
<!-- ``` -->


<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- # Join NCAA to NBA data -->
<!-- ncaa_nba_full <- draft_test %>% -->
<!--   stringdist_left_join( -->
<!--     player_fct_full, -->
<!--     by = "Player", -->
<!--     method = "jw", -->
<!--     max_dist = 0.07, -->
<!--     distance_col = "dist", -->
<!--   ) %>% -->
<!--   select(-c(Player.y, team_location, dist)) %>% -->
<!--   rename("Player" = "Player.x") -->


<!-- # Check mismatches after fuzzy joins - all good! -->
<!-- #setdiff(draft_test$Player, player_fct_full$Player) -->

<!-- # IMPORTANT: There will still be nulls for the first NBA season for a player. This is because that player didn't play in that first season and dropped out of the league. -->

<!-- ncaa_nba_full <- ncaa_nba_full %>% -->
<!--   mutate(nba_season_1 = ifelse(is.na(nba_season_1), 0, nba_season_1), -->
<!--          num_years_college = ifelse(num_years_college >= 4, 4, num_years_college)) -->


<!-- ncaa_nba_full <- ncaa_nba_full %>% -->
<!--   rowwise() %>% -->
<!--   mutate( -->
<!--     # Extract just the non-NA values from the four columns -->
<!--     actual_vals = list(na.omit(c(college_1, college_2, college_3, college_4))), -->

<!--     # Pad the end with NAs so it is exactly 4 elements long again -->
<!--     padded_vals = list(c(actual_vals, rep(NA_real_, 4 - length(actual_vals)))), -->

<!--     # Reassign them in the correct left-aligned order -->
<!--     college_1 = padded_vals[1], -->
<!--     college_2 = padded_vals[2], -->
<!--     college_3 = padded_vals[3], -->
<!--     college_4 = padded_vals[4] -->
<!--   ) %>% -->
<!--   select(-actual_vals, -padded_vals) %>% -->
<!--   ungroup() -->


<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- ncaa_nba_full %>% -->
<!--   group_by(num_years_college) %>% -->
<!--   reframe(Num_players = n(), -->
<!--           mean_pick = mean(Pk), -->
<!--           Freshman_impact = mean(college_1), -->
<!--           NBA_Year_1_impact = mean(nba_season_1)) -->
<!-- ``` -->

# DARKO

```{r}

darko <- read_csv('/Users/gauravlaw/Desktop/Understanding Data Science/SP26_IDS701_UDS_Project/data/darko_history.csv') # change to data/darko_history.csv
#darko <- read_csv("data/darko_history.csv")

darko <- darko %>%
  filter(season >= 2005) %>%
  select(player_name, season, age, dpm, dpm_rank, o_dpm, d_dpm) %>%
  group_by(player_name) %>%
  # Grabs the 5 earliest seasons for each player
  slice_min(order_by = season, n = 5) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  # Sorting by player and season makes the output easy to read
  arrange(player_name, season) %>%
  rename(nba_season = season) %>%
  # Remove accents, tildes, umlauts
  mutate(player_name = stri_trans_general(player_name, "Latin-ASCII")) %>%
  filter(!player_name %in% c("Jabari Smith", "Glenn Robinson"))

draft_test <- draft_test %>%
  mutate(Player = case_when(
    (Player == "Justin Jackson" & College == "UNC") ~ "Justin Jackson Jr.",
    (Player == "Marcus Thornton" & College == "LSU") ~ "Marcus Terell Thornton",
    TRUE ~ Player
  ))

```

```{r transpose NBA data}

# Transpose NBA data
nba_dpm <- darko %>%
  select(player_name, nba_season, dpm, o_dpm, d_dpm) %>%
  group_by(player_name) %>%
  arrange(nba_season, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(nba_yr = paste0("nba_season_", row_number())) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols     = player_name,
    names_from  = nba_yr,
    values_from = dpm
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    nba_season_1 = if ("nba_season_1" %in% names(.)) nba_season_1 else NA_real_,
    nba_season_2 = if ("nba_season_2" %in% names(.)) nba_season_2 else NA_real_,
    nba_season_3 = if ("nba_season_3" %in% names(.)) nba_season_3 else NA_real_,
    nba_season_4 = if ("nba_season_4" %in% names(.)) nba_season_4 else NA_real_,
    nba_season_5 = if ("nba_season_5" %in% names(.)) nba_season_5 else NA_real_,
    player_name = str_remove(player_name, "\\s+(Jr\\.|Sr\\.|II|III|IV|V)$")
  ) %>%
  mutate(player_name = case_when(
    player_name == "Justin Jackson" ~ "Justin Jackson Jr.",
    player_name == "Marcus Thornton"  ~ "Marcus Terell Thornton",
    TRUE ~ player_name
  )) %>%
  select(player_name, nba_season_1, nba_season_2, nba_season_3, nba_season_4, nba_season_5)

preds <- draft_test %>%
  left_join(nba_dpm, by = c(Player = "player_name")) %>%
  mutate(nba_season_1 = ifelse(is.na(nba_season_1), -10, nba_season_1))

```
